## Checklist

- [ ] This PR is for the bare-metal setup scripts in this repo, not the Docker image.
- [ ] I updated README or docs if behavior, options, service names, paths, or defaults changed.
- [ ] I tested the affected path: install / helper script / VPN mode / uninstall / docs only.
- [ ] I noted the Linux distribution, version, architecture, hosting environment, and VPN mode tested.
- [ ] I linked any relevant upstream Libreswan or xl2tpd release, tag, commit, or issue.
- [ ] I did not include IPsec PSKs, passwords, private keys, client profiles, certificates, or private data.
